---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an enhancement to TalkCut
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one-sentence summary of the proposed feature.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? Which user workflow does it improve?

## Proposed implementation

A concise description of how the feature could work. Include any API or UI
changes if applicable.

## Scope check

- [ ] This fits within the project's stated non-goals (delete-only editing,
  browser-only, no server-side processing).
- [ ] This does not require a third-party server or API key.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why is this one preferred?
